leeakpareva@gmail.com::how to ssh into v.subject: How to ssh into VScode form Asus to HP

messages.name: "Leslie
messages.text:
● From PowerShell, here are the VS Code SSH commands:

  1. First install the Remote SSH extension:

  code --install-extension ms-vscode-remote.remote-ssh

  2. Then connect to HP server via SSH in VS Code:

  code --remote ssh-remote+leeak@100.121.187.67
/home/leeak/CLAUDE_NAVADA_AGENT

  Or if that doesn't work, try:
  code --folder-uri "vscode-remote://
ssh-remote+leeak@100.121.187.67/C:/Users/leeak/CLAUDE_NAVADA_AGENT"

  3. Alternative - Open VS Code then connect:

  # Just open VS Code

Hey Leslie,
